case_title: MICHAEL LABELLA VS. BRASIL SF, LLC A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIAB

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABELLA, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BRASIL SF, LLC A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIAB ILITY COMPANY DBA BOSSA NOVA SOCIAL CLUB JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LABELLA, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRASIL SF, LLC A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIAB ILITY COMPANY DBA BOSSA NOVA SOCIAL CLUB $10,513.70 PRINCIPAL, $11.96 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,895.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
